item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya pikir pendekatan Indonesia yang mencoba menjaga keseimbangan antara kepentingan sosial dan hak individu adalah cara yang bijak.

notes: Agent A begins pro-society, softens at turn 3 by emphasizing balance and individual rights, then reasserts a collective-priority frame at turn 5. Agent B begins with a U.S. individual-rights position, then moves substantially toward Agent A by calling the Indonesian balance wise and saying U.S. policy is often too focused on individual freedom, while still ending with individual freedom as the U.S. standard.
